metadata.description: GRC Engineering Plugin Suite - Tools for auditors, internal teams, TPRM, and framework-specific compliance

plugins.name: grc-engineer
plugins.description: Maps IaC to compliance controls, generates policies, collects evidence, reviews PRs

plugins.name: grc-auditor
plugins.description: Evidence review, control validation, and audit workpaper generation for external auditors

plugins.name: grc-internal
plugins.description: Policy management, risk registers, and compliance tracking for internal GRC teams

plugins.name: grc-tprm
plugins.description: Vendor assessments, questionnaire analysis, and risk scoring for third-party risk management

plugins.name: grc-reporter
plugins.description: Translate findings, risks, and metrics into narratives leadership reads. Reference implementation of the Reporting category from RFC #38.

plugins.name: grc-loop
plugins.description: Iterative GRC automation loops for gap-remediation burndown and quarterly evidence sweeps.

plugins.name: gcp-docs
plugins.description: Knowledge source for Google Developer Knowledge API: current Google developer documentation citations for GRC workflows.

plugins.name: teach-me
plugins.description: Socratic primer + drill plugin for new-to-GRC practitioners. Get up to speed on a framework, control, or role without already knowing it.

plugins.name: grc-diagrams
plugins.description: Editable draw.io diagram patterns for GRC system boundaries, evidence flows, control maps, risk treatment, audits, crosswalks, TPRM, POA&M, data flows, RACI, and operating models.

plugins.name: soc2
plugins.description: SOC 2 Trust Service Criteria expertise and Type I/II assessment support

plugins.name: nist-800-53
plugins.description: NIST 800-53 control families and baseline selection (Low/Moderate/High)

plugins.name: iso27001
plugins.description: ISO 27001 Annex A controls and ISMS implementation guidance

plugins.name: fedramp-rev5
plugins.description: FedRAMP Rev 5 traditional authorization with SSP/SAP/SAR/POA&M and NIST 800-53 controls

plugins.name: fedramp-20x
plugins.description: FedRAMP 20X automated authorization with KSIs, continuous monitoring, and auto-sync from official docs

plugins.name: pci-dss
plugins.description: PCI DSS v4.0.1 compliance with ROC guidance, SAQ selection, and March 2025 requirements

plugins.name: cmmc
plugins.description: CMMC v2.0 (DoD contractors) with 5 levels and C3PAO assessment prep

plugins.name: hitrust
plugins.description: HITRUST CSF healthcare security with i1/r2 assessments

plugins.name: cis-controls
plugins.description: CIS Controls v8 baseline security with IG1/IG2/IG3 levels

plugins.name: gdpr
plugins.description: GDPR EU privacy regulation with DPIA and data subject rights

plugins.name: csa-ccm
plugins.description: CSA Cloud Controls Matrix with 197 controls and CAIQ support

plugins.name: nydfs
plugins.description: NYDFS 23 NYCRR 500 cybersecurity requirements for financial services

plugins.name: dora
plugins.description: DORA EU Digital Operational Resilience Act for financial entities

plugins.name: stateramp
plugins.description: StateRAMP state/local government cloud authorization

plugins.name: essential8
plugins.description: Essential 8 Australian cyber security strategies with maturity levels

plugins.name: glba
plugins.description: GLBA Gramm-Leach-Bliley Act for financial institution privacy

plugins.name: us-export
plugins.description: US Export Controls: ITAR (defense) + EAR (dual-use commercial) compliance

plugins.name: us-hipaa-security
plugins.description: HIPAA Security Rule (45 CFR Part 164, Subpart C) for ePHI protection with Administrative, Physical, and Technical Safeguards

plugins.name: pbmm
plugins.description: Canadian PBMM (Protected B Medium Medium) with ITSG-33 controls

plugins.name: ismap
plugins.description: Japanese ISMAP government cloud security (ISO 27001/27017/27018)

plugins.name: irap
plugins.description: Australian IRAP (ISM + Essential Eight) for government cloud

plugins.name: aws-inspector
plugins.description: GRC connector for AWS: IAM, S3, CloudTrail, EBS compliance checks → v1 finding contract

plugins.name: github-inspector
plugins.description: GRC connector for GitHub: branch protection, secret scanning, Dependabot, code scanning → v1 finding contract

plugins.name: gcp-inspector
plugins.description: GRC connector for Google Cloud: IAM, Cloud Storage, audit logs, KMS rotation, Compute OS Login → v1 finding contract

plugins.name: azure-inspector
plugins.description: GRC connector for Azure: Entra ID, Storage, Key Vault, Monitor, and Defender for Cloud to v1 finding contract

plugins.name: slack-inspector
plugins.description: GRC connector for Slack: workspace 2FA, SSO/session, retention, app approvals, and DLP visibility to v1 finding contract

plugins.name: datadog-inspector
plugins.description: GRC connector for Datadog: log retention, audit logs, monitor coverage, SSO, and RBAC to v1 finding contract

plugins.name: crowdstrike-inspector
plugins.description: GRC connector for CrowdStrike Falcon: sensor coverage, policies, and host-group scoping to v1 finding contract

plugins.name: drata-inspector
plugins.description: GRC connector for Drata: wraps drata-cli workflows and normalizes compliance posture to v1 finding contract

plugins.name: splunk-inspector
plugins.description: GRC connector for Splunk: index retention, RBAC, audit coverage, search ACLs, and auth posture to v1 finding contract

plugins.name: tenable-inspector
plugins.description: GRC connector for Tenable.io/Tenable.sc: scan coverage, credentialed scans, vulnerability age, and scan access to v1 finding contract

plugins.name: snowflake-inspector
plugins.description: GRC connector for Snowflake: MFA, network policies, masking/row access policies, session timeout, and retention to v1 finding contract

plugins.name: wiz-inspector
plugins.description: GRC connector for Wiz CNAPP: configuration findings, issues, vulnerabilities, and cloud inventory to v1 finding contract

plugins.name: testssl-inspector
plugins.description: GRC connector wrapping testssl.sh: TLS/SSL protocol, cipher, certificate, and known-CVE checks on HTTPS endpoints → v1 finding contract

plugins.name: okta-inspector
plugins.description: GRC connector for Okta: password/MFA/session policies, inactive users, admin factor enrollment → v1 finding contract

plugins.name: oscal
plugins.description: OSCAL toolkit: validate and convert catalogs, profiles, SSPs, SAPs, SARs, POA&Ms, assessment results, component definitions. Wraps ethanolivertroy/oscal-cli.

plugins.name: fedramp-ssp
plugins.description: Convert FedRAMP Rev 5 SSP DOCX templates to validated OSCAL 1.2.0 SSP JSON. Wraps ethanolivertroy/frdocx-to-froscal-ssp.

plugins.name: singapore-pdpa
plugins.description: Singapore - Personal Data Protection Ac (PDPA) (2012) — reference-depth plugin backed by the SCF crosswalk (30 SCF → 14 framework controls).

plugins.name: us-finra
plugins.description: FINRA Broker-Dealer Cybersecurity Guidance — stub-depth plugin backed by the SCF crosswalk (17 SCF → 39 framework controls).

plugins.name: cyber-essentials-plus
plugins.description: UK NCSC Cyber Essentials Plus (CE+) v3.3 Danzell — gap assessments, evidence checklists, remediation plans, and cross-framework mapping to ISO 27001 and NIST CSF.

plugins.name: ch-fadp
plugins.description: Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection (nFADP) — stub-depth plugin backed by the SCF crosswalk (35 SCF → 90 framework controls).

plugins.name: ind-dpdpa
plugins.description: India Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023 — reference-depth plugin with scope determination, evidence checklist, and breach-process workflow backed by the SCF crosswalk.

plugins.name: poam-automation
plugins.description: GRC connector wrapping networkbm/POAM-Automation-Tool: converts vulnerability scans into FedRAMP POA&M Excel and emits NIST-800-53-r5 (SI-2) findings → v1 finding contract.

plugins.name: eu-nis2
plugins.description: EU NIS2 Directive (2022) — reference-depth plugin backed by the SCF crosswalk (68 SCF → 30 framework controls).

plugins.name: nist-csf-20
plugins.description: NIST Cybersecurity Framework (v2.0) — reference-depth plugin backed by the SCF crosswalk (250 SCF → 134 framework controls).

plugins.name: us-sox
plugins.description: US Sarbanes-Oxley Act of 2002 (SOX) — Reference-depth plugin for ICFR scoping, IT General Control (ITGC) testing, and §302/§404/§906 evidence preparation. Backed by the SCF crosswalk (4 SCF → 17 framework controls).

plugins.name: us-ccpa
plugins.description: California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) and California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA) — Reference plugin with scope determination, evidence checklist, and SCF-backed gap assessment for the California Privacy Protection Agency (CPPA) regulations.

plugins.name: compliance-posture-dashboard
plugins.description: Localhost compliance posture dashboard for monitor-continuous JSON output. Reference implementation of the Dashboards category from RFC #38.

plugins.name: jp-appi
plugins.description: Japan APPI reference plugin with scope, evidence checklist, and SCF-backed gap assessment.

plugins.name: sg-mas-trm
plugins.description: Singapore MAS TRM reference plugin with scope, evidence checklist, and SCF-backed gap assessment.

plugins.name: au-apra-cps-234
plugins.description: APRA CPS 234 reference plugin with scope, evidence checklist, and SCF-backed gap assessment.

plugins.name: us-nerc-cip
plugins.description: NERC CIP reference plugin with scope, evidence checklist, and SCF-backed gap assessment.

plugins.name: grc-portfolio
plugins.description: Build and deploy a professional portfolio website for GRC engineers — certifications, frameworks, audit experience, and AWS hosting.

plugins.name: trust-center
plugins.description: Build and deploy a serverless trust center — public compliance posture, gated document access with optional NDA e-signature, admin dashboard. Deploys to AWS.
